free_text: Slow neutrons scattering vy heavy water in temperature
71 quarz pipes with heavy water placed as cylinder
Double TOF spectrometer of slow neutrons
DIN-1M at beam of pulsed reactor IBR-30.
Measurement at each temperature by container with heavy
water, empty container, vanadium cylinder ( the same
size as sample) used for spectrometer resolution
estimation and for absolute normalization of cross
Both defined as h*w - not explained in the article,
h - reduced Planck constant ( Dirak constant),
For neutron beam loss in in neutron guide.
Of compiler M.M. EN was calculated as :
Double differential cross section for heavy water
- Data for 12,25,38,45 deg are marked by "*0.4",
divided by 0.4 after digitization by compiler.
- Quality of digitization is not high in the ranges,
where is overlapping of symbols on figure.
- Digitization errors are given as maximal from all
